aboutMe.description1: I am a passionate Front-End Developer with over 3 years of experience building responsive, high-performance web applications using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and TypeScript. My journey into web development began out of necessity but quickly evolved into a deep commitment to mastering the craft. I dedicated countless hours to learning—exploring documentation, experimenting with code, and working on personal and professional projects.
aboutMe.description2: My core expertise includes modern JavaScript/TypeScript, Vue.js (Options and Composition API), Nuxt.js, and state management with Vuex and Pinia. I have extensive experience integrating RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Axios or Fetch, configuring project architecture, optimizing performance through SSR, lazy loading, and code-splitting, and implementing authentication flows with JWT and OAuth.
aboutMe.description3: I've also built mobile-ready applications using Ionic and Capacitor, and developed APKs for platforms like Sunmi Store. My workflow often includes tools such as GitHub Actions, ESLint, Prettier, and Husky to ensure code quality and CI/CD efficiency.
aboutMe.description4: Throughout my career, I've worked in Scrum teams, participated in technical discussions, contributed to architecture decisions, and mentored junior developers through code reviews. I enjoy translating complex UI/UX designs (from Figma or PSD) into elegant, reusable components and continually strive to enhance both product quality and user experience.
aboutMe.description5: I am now looking for an opportunity to join a team of motivated professionals where I can continue learning, contribute meaningfully, and help build products that have real impact.
